name: Leagold Mining Corp.
description: Leagold Mining Corporation was a Canada-based mid-tier gold producer focused on the acquisition and development of gold mining operations in Latin America. The company operated several key assets, including the Los Filos Mine in Mexico, as well as the RDM, Fazenda, and Pilar mines in Brazil. Leagold was dedicated to building a sustainable, growth-oriented mining business before completing a merger of equals with Equinox Gold Corp. in March 2020, which resulted in the creation of a premier gold producer operating entirely within the Americas.
